highlights: Remote Desktop to an SCVMM VM — one-click RDP straight from the VM, no IP lookup or host hop
Tunnelled through the on-site OneGlue agent — reaches VMs on internal networks; brokered per-session, single-use
One-click domain login when a shared/domain credential covers the VM (via its SCVMM cloud or org); password injected at the agent only, never in the browser
Smart guest-IP handling — pick when a VM has several, clear message when none is reachable
Dedicated org-grantable connect-to-VM permission (separate from credential management); cross-org/cross-tenant impossible; every session audit-logged
